caption: Fixes #994: Battle._apply_order_cmd's lateral-pivot dispatch now respects Unit.disciplined. Given the identical lateral move order, the left (disciplined) regiment arms the formed quarter-turn maneuver and its facing measurably sweeps through a partial heading (order_phase TURN, maneuver QUARTER_TURN) before settling and marching. The right (undisciplined) regiment never arms that maneuver at all: its order_phase stays REFORM through the same window, and its facing shows no partial heading in any sampled tick -- it holds its original bearing, then reads as already turned partway through that same reform hold, well before marching starts. Before this fix both regiments silently took the disciplined regiment's formed-turn path.
